texts: Select Menu > Contacts > menu > Add new contact.
Select where to save the contact.
Write the name, and type in the number.
Save a contact from the call logs
Select Menu > Call logs, and select the call type.
Scroll to the number you want to save and select menu > Add to contacts > New contact.
Select where to save the contact.
Add the contact details and select menu > Save contact.
You can call a contact directly from the contacts list.
Select Menu > Contacts, scroll to the contact you want to call, and press the call key.
